additives.description_en: Natural yellow colorant from turmeric root.
additives.description_tr: Zerdeçal kökünden elde edilen doğal sarı boya maddesi.

additives.description_en: Natural yellow-orange colorant, also a vitamin.
additives.description_tr: Doğal sarı-turuncu boya, aynı zamanda bir vitamin.

additives.description_en: Synthetic yellow azo dye. Linked to hyperactivity in children.
additives.description_tr: Sentetik sarı azo boyası. Çocuklarda hiperaktivite ile ilişkilendirilmiştir.

additives.description_en: Synthetic yellow dye. May trigger hyperactivity in sensitive children.
additives.description_tr: Sentetik sarı boya. Hassas çocuklarda hiperaktivite tetikleyebilir.

additives.description_en: Synthetic orange-yellow azo dye. Part of the 'Southampton Six' linked to hyperactivity.
additives.description_tr: Sentetik turuncu-sarı azo boyası. Hiperaktiviteyle ilgili 'Southampton Altılısı'nın bir parçası.

additives.description_en: Red colorant from cochineal insects. Not vegan/vegetarian.
additives.description_tr: Koşinil böceğinden elde edilen kırmızı boya. Vegan/vejetaryen değildir.

additives.description_en: Synthetic red azo dye. Part of Southampton Six.
additives.description_tr: Sentetik kırmızı azo boyası. Southampton Altılısı'nın bir parçası.

additives.description_en: Synthetic dark red azo dye. Banned in the USA.
additives.description_tr: Sentetik koyu kırmızı azo boyası. ABD'de yasaklanmıştır.

additives.description_en: Synthetic red dye. Part of Southampton Six. Requires warning label.
additives.description_tr: Sentetik kırmızı boya. Southampton Altılısı. Uyarı etiketi gerektirir.

additives.description_en: Synthetic cherry-pink dye. Contains iodine.
additives.description_tr: Sentetik kiraz pembesi boya. İyot içerir.

additives.description_en: Synthetic red azo dye. Part of Southampton Six.
additives.description_tr: Sentetik kırmızı azo boyası. Southampton Altılısı.

additives.description_en: Synthetic blue dye. May cause allergic reactions.

additives.description_en: Synthetic blue dye derived from indigo.
additives.description_tr: İndigodan türetilen sentetik mavi boya.

additives.description_en: Synthetic blue dye widely used in foods.
additives.description_tr: Gıdalarda yaygın olarak kullanılan sentetik mavi boya.

additives.description_en: Natural green colorant from plant chlorophyll.
additives.description_tr: Bitki klorofilinden elde edilen doğal yeşil boya.

additives.description_en: Brown caramel colorant made by heating sugar.
additives.description_tr: Şekerin ısıtılmasıyla elde edilen kahverengi karamel boya.

additives.description_en: Caramel made with sulphite and ammonia. Contains 4-MEI, a potential carcinogen.
additives.description_tr: Sülfit ve amonyak ile yapılan karamel. Potansiyel kanserojen 4-MEI içerir.

additives.description_en: Synthetic black azo dye.
additives.description_tr: Sentetik siyah azo boyası.

additives.description_en: Natural orange-red colorant, provitamin A.
additives.description_tr: Doğal turuncu-kırmızı boya, A vitamini öncülü.

additives.description_en: Natural orange-red colorant from paprika peppers.
additives.description_tr: Kırmızı biberden elde edilen doğal turuncu-kırmızı boya.

additives.description_en: Natural red colorant from beetroot.
additives.description_tr: Kırmızı pancardan elde edilen doğal kırmızı boya.

additives.description_en: Natural red/purple colorants from berries and grapes.
additives.description_tr: Meyve ve üzümden elde edilen doğal kırmızı/mor boyalar.

additives.description_en: Synthetic white pigment. Banned in the EU and Turkey due to genotoxicity concerns. Potential carcinogen.
additives.description_tr: Sentetik beyaz pigment. Genotoksisite endişeleri nedeniyle AB ve Türkiye'de yasaklanmıştır. Potansiyel kanserojen.

additives.description_en: Natural mineral colorants (yellow, red, black).
additives.description_tr: Doğal mineral boyalar (sarı, kırmızı, siyah).

additives.description_en: Preservative inhibiting mold and yeast growth.
additives.description_tr: Küf ve maya büyümesini önleyen koruyucu.

additives.description_en: Salt of sorbic acid. Widely used preservative.
additives.description_tr: Sorbik asidin tuzu. Yaygın kullanılan koruyucu.

additives.description_en: Calcium salt of sorbic acid. Mold inhibitor.
additives.description_tr: Sorbik asidin kalsiyum tuzu. Küf önleyici.

additives.description_en: Preservative. Combined with ascorbic acid (E300) may form benzene, a carcinogen.
additives.description_tr: Koruyucu. Askorbik asit (E300) ile birleştiğinde kanserojen benzen oluşabilir.

additives.description_en: Common preservative in soft drinks. May form benzene with vitamin C. Linked to hyperactivity.
additives.description_tr: Meşrubatlarda yaygın koruyucu. C vitamini ile benzen oluşturabilir. Hiperaktivite ile ilişkili.

additives.description_en: Preservative. Similar concerns to sodium benzoate.
additives.description_tr: Koruyucu. Sodyum benzoata benzer endişeler.

additives.description_en: Preservative. Similar concerns to other benzoates.
additives.description_tr: Koruyucu. Diğer benzoatlarla benzer endişeler.

additives.description_en: Paraben preservative. Endocrine disruptor concerns. Banned for use in food in EU.
additives.description_tr: Paraben koruyucu. Endokrin bozucu endişeler. AB'de gıdalarda kullanımı yasaklanmıştır.

additives.description_en: Preservative and antioxidant. Triggers asthma in sensitive individuals.
additives.description_tr: Koruyucu ve antioksidan. Hassas kişilerde astımı tetikler.

additives.description_en: Sulphite preservative. May trigger asthma in asthmatics.
additives.description_tr: Sülfit koruyucu. Astım hastalarında reaksiyon tetikleyebilir.

additives.description_en: Sulphite preservative used in wine, dried fruits. Asthma trigger.

additives.description_en: Sulphite preservative. Common in wine production.

additives.description_en: Curing salt for meats. Forms nitrosamines which are carcinogenic.
additives.description_tr: Et kürleme tuzu. Kanserojen nitrozaminler oluşturur.

additives.description_en: Used in processed meats. Forms carcinogenic nitrosamines. IARC Group 2A.
additives.description_tr: İşlenmiş etlerde kullanılır. Kanserojen nitrozaminler oluşturur. IARC Grup 2A.

additives.description_en: Preservative in cured meats. Converts to nitrite in body.
additives.description_tr: Kürleme etlerinde koruyucu. Vücutta nitrite dönüşür.

additives.description_en: Preservative in cured meats and cheese.
additives.description_tr: Kürleme etleri ve peynirde koruyucu.

additives.description_en: Natural acid found in vinegar. Safe preservative.
additives.description_tr: Sirkede bulunan doğal asit. Güvenli koruyucu.

additives.description_en: Natural acid produced by fermentation. Very safe.

additives.description_en: Mold inhibitor in bread and baked goods.
additives.description_tr: Ekmek ve fırın ürünlerinde küf önleyici.

additives.description_en: Sodium salt of propionic acid. Bread preservative.
additives.description_tr: Propionik asidin sodyum tuzu. Ekmek koruyucu.

additives.description_en: Calcium salt of propionic acid. Common in bread.
additives.description_tr: Propionik asidin kalsiyum tuzu. Ekmekte yaygın.

additives.description_en: Natural gas used for carbonation and packaging.
additives.description_tr: Karbonasyon ve ambalajlamada kullanılan doğal gaz.

additives.description_en: Natural acid found in apples. Safe acidity regulator.
additives.description_tr: Elmalarda bulunan doğal asit. Güvenli asitlik düzenleyici.

additives.description_en: Vitamin C. Natural antioxidant. Very safe.
additives.description_tr: C vitamini. Doğal antioksidan. Çok güvenli.

additives.description_en: Sodium salt of vitamin C. Antioxidant.
additives.description_tr: C vitamininin sodyum tuzu. Antioksidan.

additives.description_en: Calcium salt of vitamin C. Antioxidant and mineral supplement.
additives.description_tr: C vitamininin kalsiyum tuzu. Antioksidan ve mineral takviyesi.

additives.description_en: Natural vitamin E extract. Antioxidant.
additives.description_tr: Doğal E vitamini özütü. Antioksidan.

additives.description_en: Synthetic vitamin E. Antioxidant.
additives.description_tr: Sentetik E vitamini. Antioksidan.

additives.description_en: Antioxidant in fats. May cause allergic reactions and is suspected endocrine disruptor.
additives.description_tr: Yağlarda antioksidan. Alerjik reaksiyonlara yol açabilir, endokrin bozucu olduğundan şüphelenilmektedir.

additives.description_en: Synthetic antioxidant. Linked to tumor promotion at high doses. Banned in Japan.
additives.description_tr: Sentetik antioksidan. Yüksek dozlarda tümör gelişimiyle ilişkili. Japonya'da yasaklı.

additives.description_en: Synthetic antioxidant in fats. Possible carcinogen. IARC Group 2B.
additives.description_tr: Yağlarda sentetik antioksidan. Olası kanserojen. IARC Grup 2B.

additives.description_en: Synthetic antioxidant. Suspected carcinogen and endocrine disruptor.
additives.description_tr: Sentetik antioksidan. Şüpheli kanserojen ve endokrin bozucu.

additives.description_en: Natural emulsifier from soy or sunflower. Very safe.
additives.description_tr: Soya veya ayçiçeğinden doğal emülgatör. Çok güvenli.

additives.description_en: Natural acid found in citrus fruits. Very safe.

additives.description_en: Sodium salts of citric acid. Safe acidity regulators.

additives.description_en: Potassium salts of citric acid. Safe.

additives.description_en: Calcium salts of citric acid. Safe.

additives.description_en: Natural acid in grapes and wine. Safe.

additives.description_en: Phosphate emulsifiers. High intake may affect kidney function.

additives.description_en: Sodium salt of alginic acid from seaweed.

additives.description_en: Natural gelling agent from red algae.

additives.description_en: Sugar alcohol. Laxative effect in large amounts. Low glycemic index.

additives.description_en: Natural humectant and solvent. Very safe.

additives.description_en: Synthetic emulsifier. May disrupt gut microbiome and cause intestinal inflammation.
additives.description_tr: Sentetik emülgatör. Bağırsak mikrobiyomunu bozabilir ve bağırsak iltihabına yol açabilir.

additives.description_en: Synthetic emulsifier. May disrupt gut microbiome.
additives.description_tr: Sentetik emülgatör. Bağırsak mikrobiyomunu bozabilir.

additives.description_en: Natural fiber from fruit peel. Very safe. Prebiotic.

additives.description_tr: Hayvan kemiği/derisinden protein. Vegan veya vejetaryen değil. Sadece helal hayvanlardan ise helal.

additives.description_en: Phosphate salts. Excessive intake linked to kidney disease.
additives.description_tr: Fosfat tuzları. Aşırı alım böbrek hastalığıyla ilişkili.

additives.description_en: Phosphate salts used in processed meats. Kidney concerns at high intake.

additives.description_en: Modified cellulose. Thickener and emulsifier.

additives.description_tr: Modifiye selüloz koyulaştırıcı. Yüksek dozlarda bağırsak mikrobiyomunu etkileyebilir.

additives.description_tr: Sitrik asit ve gliseritlerden emülgatör.

additives.name_tr: Mono ve Diasetil Tartarik Asit Esterleri (DATEM)

additives.description_tr: Ekmekte kullanılan DATEM emülgatör. Endüstriyel fırıncılıkta yaygın.

additives.description_en: Emulsifier from sorbitol and stearic acid.

additives.description_en: Baking powder component. Safe.
additives.description_tr: Kabartma tozu bileşeni. Güvenli.

additives.description_en: Firming agent in canned vegetables and cheese.

additives.description_en: Firming agent and bread conditioner. Natural mineral.

additives.description_en: Anti-caking agent in powdered foods. Natural mineral.

additives.description_en: Anti-caking agent. Safe.

additives.description_en: Anti-caking agent. May be animal-derived.
additives.description_tr: Topaklanmayı önleyici. Hayvansal kaynaklı olabilir.

additives.description_en: Naturally occurring amino acid. Precursor to MSG.
additives.description_tr: Doğal amino asit. MSG öncülü.

additives.description_en: Controversial flavor enhancer. Linked to headaches, Chinese Restaurant Syndrome. Triggers instant worst score.
additives.description_tr: Tartışmalı lezzet artırıcı. Baş ağrısı, Çin Restoranı Sendromu ile ilişkili. Anlık en kötü puanı tetikler.

additives.description_en: Potassium salt of glutamic acid. Flavor enhancer similar to MSG.
additives.description_tr: Glutamik asidin potasyum tuzu. MSG'ye benzer lezzet artırıcı.

additives.description_en: Magnesium salt of glutamate. Flavor enhancer.
additives.description_tr: Glutamatın magnezyum tuzu. Lezzet artırıcı.

additives.description_tr: Genellikle MSG ile kullanılan lezzet artırıcı. Gut hastalığını tetikleyebilir.

additives.description_en: Flavor enhancer often combined with MSG. Derived from fish or meat.

additives.description_en: Blend of E627 and E631. Strong flavor enhancer.

additives.description_en: Anti-foaming agent in cooking oils and fast food. Generally considered safe.

additives.description_en: Natural wax from bees. Not vegan.
additives.description_tr: Arılardan doğal balmumu. Vegan değil.

additives.description_en: Natural wax from carnauba palm. Vegan.
additives.description_tr: Karnauba palmiyesinden doğal balmumu. Vegan.

additives.description_en: Flour improver banned in EU, Australia, most countries. Linked to respiratory sensitization. Banned in Turkey.
additives.description_tr: AB, Avustralya ve çoğu ülkede yasaklı un iyileştirici. Solunum hassasiyetiyle ilişkili. Türkiye'de yasaklı.

additives.description_en: Inert gas for food packaging.
additives.description_tr: Gıda ambalajı için inert gaz.

additives.description_en: Inert packaging gas. Very safe.
additives.description_tr: İnert ambalaj gazı. Çok güvenli.

additives.description_en: Packaging gas for fresh produce.
additives.description_tr: Taze ürünler için ambalaj gazı.

additives.description_en: Artificial sweetener. No calories. Some animal studies showed tumor formation. Controversial.
additives.description_tr: Yapay tatlandırıcı. Kalori yok. Bazı hayvan çalışmalarında tümör oluşumu görüldü. Tartışmalı.

additives.description_en: Artificial sweetener. IARC Group 2B (possibly carcinogenic). Contains phenylalanine (PKU risk). Controversial.
additives.description_tr: Yapay tatlandırıcı. IARC Grup 2B (muhtemelen kanserojen). Fenilalanin içerir (PKU riski). Tartışmalı.

additives.description_en: Artificial sweetener. Banned in the USA. May be carcinogenic.

additives.description_en: Oldest artificial sweetener. Previously listed as possible carcinogen, later removed.

additives.description_en: Natural protein sweetener from West African fruit. Very safe.

additives.description_en: Natural sweetener from stevia plant. Safe, no-calorie option.

additives.description_en: Artificial sweetener derived from aspartame. Metabolizes differently from aspartame.
additives.description_tr: Aspartamdan türetilen yapay tatlandırıcı. Aspartamdan farklı metabolize olur.

additives.description_en: Natural sugar alcohol from birch wood. Good for dental health.
additives.description_tr: Kayın ağacından doğal şeker alkol. Diş sağlığı için iyi.

additives.description_en: Natural sugar alcohol. Very low calorie. Good tolerance. Possibly linked to cardiovascular risk at high doses.

additives.description_en: Enzymes that break down starch. Natural.

additives.description_en: Chemically modified starch. Safe thickener.

additives.description_en: Modified starch for freeze-thaw stability.
additives.description_tr: Dondurma-çözme stabilitesi için modifiye nişasta.

additives.description_en: Acetylated modified starch. Common thickener.

additives.description_en: Cross-linked hydroxypropylated starch. Very stable thickener.
